title: crepis macropus
intro: Crepis macropus, also known as large-hedged hawk's-beard, is a plant species in the dandelion family. It is native to Australia and New Zealand and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems. Crepis macropus can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it may also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
